rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Elec. Code §271.014, which governs conflicts between joint election laws and other statutes.
quote: A law outside this code pertaining to a joint election supersedes this chapter to the extent of any conflict.
_note: No conflict; the rule concerns joint election procedures and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
